senses.gloss: weibliche Person: Dienstgrad eines Offiziersanwärters, in Deutschland zwischen dem Fahnenjunker und Oberfähnrich
senses.gloss_en_full: A military rank for an officer candidate, in Germany positioned between Fahnenjunker and Oberfähnrich during officer training.

senses.gloss: weibliche Person: Person, die den Dienstgrad eines Fähnrichs innehat
senses.gloss_en_full: A woman holding the Fähnrich rank during officer training in the German armed forces.
